mapper.select: SELECT CAST(role.id AS CHAR) AS id, role.role_name AS roleName, role.role_code AS roleCode, role.data_scope AS dataScope, COUNT(DISTINCT user_role.user_id) AS memberCount, COUNT(DISTINCT role_menu.menu_id) AS menuCount, role.status AS status FROM sys_role role LEFT JOIN sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.role_id = role.id LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu role_menu ON role_menu.role_id = role.id WHERE role.deleted = 0 GROUP BY role.id, role.role_name, role.role_code, role.data_scope, role.status ORDER BY role.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CAST(menu.id AS CHAR) AS id, menu.menu_name AS menuName, menu.menu_type AS menuType, menu.path AS path, menu.permission_code AS permissionCode, COALESCE(parent.menu_name, 'ROOT') AS parentName, menu.sort_no AS sortNo, menu.status AS status FROM sys_menu menu LEFT JOIN sys_menu parent ON parent.id = menu.parent_id AND parent.deleted = 0 WHERE menu.deleted = 0 ORDER BY menu.sort_no ASC, menu.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CAST(login_log.id AS CHAR) AS id, login_log.username AS username, COALESCE(role.role_code, '-') AS roleCode, login_log.ip_address AS ipAddress, login_log.login_status AS loginStatus, login_log.login_message AS loginMessage, DATE_FORMAT(login_log.login_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS loginTime FROM sys_login_log login_log LEFT JOIN sys_user user_info ON user_info.id = login_log.user_id AND user_info.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.user_id = user_info.id LEFT JOIN sys_role role ON role.id = user_role.role_id AND role.deleted = 0 ORDER BY login_log.login_time DESC, login_log.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_login_log login_log LEFT JOIN sys_user user_info ON user_info.id = login_log.user_id AND user_info.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.user_id = user_info.id LEFT JOIN sys_role role ON role.id = user_role.role_id AND role.deleted = 0

SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS id, username AS username, module_name AS moduleName, business_type AS businessType, request_uri AS requestUri, operation_status AS operationStatus, response_message AS responseMessage, DATE_FORMAT(operation_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS operationTime FROM sys_operation_log WHERE business_type IN ('IMPORT_DATA', 'EXPORT_DATA') AND (request_uri LIKE CONCAT('%type=', #{type}, '%') OR request_params LIKE CONCAT('%{"type":"', #{type}, '"}%')) ORDER BY operation_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CAST(sku.id AS CHAR) AS id, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, sku.spec_text AS specText, sku.base_price AS basePrice, sku.cost_price AS costPrice, sku.stock_qty AS stockQty, sku.sale_status AS saleStatus FROM product_sku sku JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 WHERE sku.deleted = 0 ORDER BY sku.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE customer_info SET company_name = #{companyName}, member_level = #{memberLevel}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, invite_code = #{inviteCode}, status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE supplier_info SET supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, status = #{status}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE product_sku sku JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 SET spu.spu_name = #{spuName}, sku.sku_name = #{skuName}, sku.spec_text = #{specText}, sku.base_price = #{basePrice}, sku.cost_price = #{costPrice}, sku.stock_qty = #{stockQty}, sku.sale_status = #{saleStatus}, sku.updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, spu.updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE sku.id = #{id} AND sku.deleted = 0
